response.overview: Chanel Camryn, your adorable flatmate, is going out with a handsome man.  She asks you to assist her in selecting a dress at the beginning of the next scenario.  She sexily tries on a red dress and a white dress without leaving the room, exposing her titties and gorgeous butt.  Chanel abruptly approaches and admits that there isn't a date; rather, it was merely a pretext for her to undress in front of you and finally acknowledge that she has had a long-term crush on you.Chanel Camryn, your adorable flatmate, is going out with a handsome man.  She asks you to assist her in selecting a dress at the beginning of the next scenario.  She tries on a white garment sensuously without leaving the room.
response.title: Curious Roommates: Her Crush
